title: Improve value selection functionality when using filters in dashboards
excerpt: In dashboards, when using the quick filter and selecting several values, it becomes annoying that you are repeatedly automatically “sent up” to the top of the list where you select from. When adding additional values you…

posts.author: jenny.dagab (Jenny Janslätt Axelsson)
posts.cookedHtml: In dashboards, when using the quick filter and selecting several values, it becomes annoying that you are repeatedly automatically “sent up” to the top of the list where you select from. When adding additional values you repeatedly have to scroll down all the way and sometimes also click “Show more”. This is not a problem if you only need to select few values, but as I said, it becomes both time consuming and annoying when you have to repeat it many times.
